transcript.text: Sorry, I joined the meeting with my PC, which doesn't have a camera, webcam, so I can't open it.
I just wanted to check with you.
Regarding those useful industry pages, because Dominic, a previous designer, had built something.
He had told me that, you know, those pages were static and I could not publish, etc.
So I just wanted to check some things.
Can I share my screen first?
So I think he had created these one of the industries and industry tasks.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the status and functionality of industry-specific pages on the Datagrid website.](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Previous designer (Dominic) created static industry pages with limited publishing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Vivek seeking clarification on current page functionality and potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Audio-only meeting due to Nour's hardware limitations (no webcam)](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Topics

### Current State of Industry Pages

  - [Dominic (previous designer) built industry-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Pages are currently static with restricted publishing abilities](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Vivek shared his screen to showcase example industry/task pages](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Technical Limitations

  - [Nour joined via PC without camera/webcam, limiting visual communication](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Implies potential need for more accessible meeting tools or hardware upgrades](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

### Desired Functionality

  - [Vivek's inquiry suggests a need for dynamic, easily updatable industry pages](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Implicit goal: Improve content management system for industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review existing industry pages created by Dominic](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Assess current publishing limitations and identify required improvements](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=36.0)
  - [Explore options for making industry pages dynamic and easily updateable](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting with visual capabilities to dive deeper into page structure and functionality](https://fathom.video/share/QXRRi1d1rouAF-nHbKUXzCfA52iHMVXR?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
